title: extensions.cypher_preprocessor
description: Manifest-declarable hook fired before every cypher_query and tools[].cypher invocation. The hook can rewrite the query string and/or params before they reach graph.cypher(). Requires trust.allow_query_preprocessor: true at the manifest top level.

module.description: Path to the .py file containing the preprocessor. Manifest-relative or absolute.

class.description: Importable class name in the module. Instantiated with kwargs. The class must implement rewrite(query, params) -> (query, params).

function.description: Module-level free function with signature (query, params) -> (query, params). Mutually exclusive with class.

kwargs.description: Passed to the class constructor as keyword arguments. Ignored for function: loaders.
